hero.title: Welcome to Dalyan
hero.subtitle: Turkey's Hidden Paradise
hero.description: Where ancient history meets untouched nature — discover Lycian rock tombs, cruise the reed-lined delta, walk pristine Turtle Beach, and bathe in thermal springs that have healed travellers for millennia.

hubs.title: Discover Dalyan
hubs.subtitle: A timeless destination where nature, history, and adventure converge

stats.title: Why Visit Dalyan?
stats.subtitle: A rare corner of Turkey where 3,000 years of civilisation blend seamlessly with protected nature

1.quote: We took the river boat past the rock tombs at sunset and it was genuinely breathtaking. Dalyan feels like a secret the rest of the world hasn't found yet.
1.name: Sarah M.

2.quote: The combination of ancient ruins, thermal springs and unspoiled beaches is unlike anything else in the Mediterranean. We keep coming back every summer.
2.name: Hans W.

3.quote: Watching a Caretta Caretta turtle swim alongside our boat was a once-in-a-lifetime moment. Dalyan is a paradise for nature lovers and families alike.
3.name: Marie L.
